title: New immunohistochemistry panel improves classification of diagnostically difficult soft tissue tumors
summary: This cohort study assessed immunohistochemistry and molecular pathology markers for soft tissue pathology classification and highlighted limitations requiring external validation. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: Consensus update on diagnostic criteria for endometrial carcinoma subtyping in surgical pathology
summary: This consensus statement reviews histopathology, immunohistochemistry, molecular pathology, grading, staging, and reporting recommendations for endometrial carcinoma subtyping in diagnostic surgical pathology. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: External validation of artificial intelligence for mitotic count assessment on whole slide imaging
summary: A multicenter validation study evaluated deep learning image analysis for mitotic count assessment in surgical pathology whole slide imaging and reported interobserver agreement with pathologists. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: A multicenter randomized trial of point-of-care C-reactive protein testing for acute cough in primary care
summary: This randomized trial evaluated whether point-of-care C-reactive protein testing in primary care reduced antibiotic prescribing for patients with acute cough without increasing reconsultation or adverse events. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: A preprint describing a tumor-agnostic companion diagnostic for targeted therapy selection
summary: This preprint reports a molecularly selected tumor-agnostic companion diagnostic associated with pathologic response to targeted therapy. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: MicroRNA signature for early-stage non-small cell lung cancer using FFPE tissue and qRT-PCR
summary: This cohort study assessed a microRNA signature in FFPE tumor tissue from patients with early-stage non-small cell lung cancer and reported diagnostic accuracy requiring external validation. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.

title: Murine cell line model of a rare signaling pathway
summary: This in vitro cell line study in mice explores a signaling pathway with unclear clinical relevance. Interpretation should remain cautious because this is abstract-level surveillance.
